title: CMA's approach to markets work
body: "This document sets out the approach that the CMA will take to using its markets powers in the coming years, including:    our ambition for a markets regime that drives maximum benefit for consumers, businesses and the UK economy   practical changes to how the CMA will work to reflect our ‘4Ps’ framework, the UK government’s Regulation Action Plan and strategic steer   what stakeholders can expect from us – from business and consumer groups, to other UK bodies with policy and regulatory oversight for markets we are looking at     Read more from Sarah Cardell, Chief Executive of the CMA.  "
